evals.prompt: Ingest a local research note about platform readiness into the North Star planning evidence folder.
evals.expected_output: Runs the ingest command, copies the source into collateral, writes a normalized evidence item, updates the registry, and returns a northstar:// evidence reference.
assertions: The source file is copied into the North Star collateral folder.
A normalized evidence item is written and schema-valid.
The registry includes the evidence ID and reference URI.
The item is not converted directly into a requirement or implementation lane.

evals.prompt: Find all registered North Star evidence tagged gravity and matching observability.
evals.expected_output: Queries the evidence registry by tag and text and returns matching evidence IDs, references, titles, summaries, tags, and item paths.
assertions: The query reads the evidence registry.
Filtering can match tags and text.
Missing registries are handled without inventing evidence.
